_comment: Store actual webhook URLs in .env file. These are template placeholders.
_instructions: Replace placeholder URLs with real Zapier webhook URLs from your Zaps

main_webhook.description: Primary webhook - triggers full distribution pipeline

etsy_webhook.description: Creates draft listing on Etsy via Zapier
etsy_webhook.note: Set active: true after connecting Etsy in Zapier

google_drive_webhook.description: Uploads ZIP to Google Drive via Zapier
google_drive_webhook.note: Set active: true after connecting Google Drive in Zapier

notion_webhook.description: Logs new pack to Notion product database

email_notification.description: Sends email summary after pack generation

payload_schema._description: Standard payload sent to all webhooks

fields.image_count: integer - number of images in pack
fields.zip_size_mb: float - size of zip in MB
fields.zip_base64: string - base64 encoded zip (for small packs < 10MB)
fields.gdrive_path: string - intended Google Drive folder path
fields.manifest_url: string - URL to manifest.json if hosted
